shared_attributes.purpose: collision targets that trigger game over

context.role: Ground obstacle requiring precise jump timing, tallest cactus variant
context.screen_position: y=0 (ground level), scrolls from right to left
context.usage_scenario: Challenging obstacle appearing from game start (0+ points), spawn probability 25%, requires higher jump

visual_specification.shape: Three vertical cacti grouped together with varying heights
visual_specification.details: Three cacti in group, varying heights creating irregular top silhouette, tallest reaches 100px, spiky protrusions

relationships.shared_with: Same visual style as other cacti variants
relationships.differences_from: cactus_small is 34x70px (1 cactus), cactus_medium is 68x70px (2 cacti), cactus_large is tallest at 100px height

explicit_negations: No uniform height across the three cacti
No spacing between cacti in group
